title: Principal and surety bound in solido
doc_html:
§4.  Principal and surety bound in solido

The bond required by R.S. 45:2 shall provide that the principal and the surety are bound in solido for the amount thereof.
doc_text:
§4.  Principal and surety bound in solido
The bond required by R.S. 45:2 shall provide that the principal and the surety are bound in solido for the amount thereof.
